preToolUse.bash: input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.toolArgs.path // ""'); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.drawio$'; then echo '{"permissionDecision": "allow"}'; else echo '{"permissionDecision": "allow"}'; fi

postToolUse.bash: input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.toolArgs.path // ""'); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.drawio$'; then if grep -q 'edge="1".*/>$' "$file" 2>/dev/null; then echo '{"additionalContext": "WARNING: drawio has self-closing edge cells. Must fix."}'; else echo '{}'; fi; else echo '{}'; fi
